sessions.description: TSS 60, IF 0.71, kJ(Cal) 689.  Description: 8min easy spin 3min LT1 60 sec easy 5 x30 sec V02- 30 easy extra 2min easy  Main set - Aerobic Progression 5x8min building from Aerobic to just above LT1 (tempo) all with 1 min recovery  8min easy cd
TSS 114, IF 0.75, kJ(Cal) 1246.  Description: 60 mins Z2 / 4-5/10 effort  3x10mins (30:30s) with 5 mins between 30secs VO2/ 30 secs Z1  15 mins Z2

TSS 51, IF 0.67, kJ(Cal) 632.  Description: 8 mins warm up  MAIN SET 3 rounds of 3mins decreasing cadence 85/75/65 to set up to start a 15 second seated sprint aiming to reach 120rpm or more  3min extra recovery  20 min build to LT1 in 5 min sections  6 min easy
TSS 66, IF 0.74, kJ(Cal) 722.  Description: 10 min easy spin 4x1min building to LT2 2min easy 6x30 sec V02 efforts- 30 sec easy Main set 4x(8 mins at LT1, 2mins at LT2, 1 min easy)  7 min cool down

TSS 73, IF 0.85, kJ(Cal) 639.  Description: You can use any form, of FTP test protocol so long as it includes a 20min max effort - no ramp tests or different variations.  CP20 protocol - ERG mode OFF  10 mins easy 4x1min building 2 mins easy 5 mins at 90% 10 min very easy  20 min test - no erg mode, do not be limited by numbers in the workout builder 10 min easy spin
TSS 76, IF 0.77, kJ(Cal) 822.  Description: Building resilience and fatigue resistance. The ability to dig deep as you get tired.  3 blocks of tempo riding with recoveries of 6.5mins in mid Z2.
